questions.explanation: Count one by one: 1, 2, 3. There are 3 apples.
When we count: 5, 6, 7 — so 7 comes after 6.
Counting up: 8, 9, 10. So 9 comes just before 10.
Count: 4 then 5. So the answer is 5.
8 comes after 5 when counting, so 8 is greater than 5. True.
Start at 2 and count 3 more: 3, 4, 5. So 2 + 3 = 5.
One more than 4 is 5. So 4 + 1 = 5.
5 and 5 more makes 10.
Count 2 more after 3: 4, 5. So 3 + 2 = 5.
One plus one makes two. True.
Take 2 away from 5: 5, 4, 3. So 5 - 2 = 3.
If you take all 4 away from 4, nothing is left. So 4 - 4 = 0.
One less than 6 is 5. So 6 - 1 = 5.
3 - 1 = 2, not 1. So this is False.
Among 7, 2, 9, 5 the smallest is 2.
Among 3, 8, 6, 1 the biggest is 8.

questions.text: The number ten is written as ____.
questions.explanation: Ten is written using 1 and 0 as 10.
Zero means there is nothing to count. True.

questions.text: How many sides does a triangle have?
questions.explanation: A triangle has 3 sides and 3 corners.

questions.text: A ball is shaped like a ____.
questions.explanation: A ball is round like a circle/sphere.

questions.text: How many corners does a square have?
questions.explanation: A square has 4 equal sides and 4 corners.

questions.text: A shape with no corners and round all over is a ____.
questions.explanation: A circle is round and has no corners.
A rectangle has 4 sides (2 long and 2 short). True.
First group has 2 fish, second has 4 fish. 4 is more, so the second group.
Between 4 and 6 comes 5.
7 comes after 4, so 7 is greater than 4.
9 is greater than 2, so saying 2 > 9 is False.
The pattern counts up by 1, so after 3 comes 4.
The numbers go up by 2 each time, so after 6 comes 8.
Counting by 5: 5, 10, 15. So the answer is 15.

questions.text: In the pattern 1, 3, 5, 7 the numbers go up by 2.
questions.explanation: 1→3→5→7 each jumps by 2. True.
There are 5 stars.

questions.text: There are 3 red balloons and 4 blue balloons. How many balloons in all?
questions.explanation: 3 + 4 = 7 balloons.

questions.text: Riya had 8 toffees. She ate 3. How many are left?
questions.explanation: 8 - 3 = 5 toffees left.

questions.text: The number that comes between 8 and 10 is ____.
questions.explanation: 8, 9, 10 — so 9 comes between.
Counting: 9 then 10. True.

questions.text: Which one is FIRST in a line? 🚗🚙🚕 (left to right)
questions.explanation: The car on the far left is first.

questions.text: Which is LONGER, a pencil or a school bus?
questions.explanation: A school bus is much longer than a pencil.

questions.text: An elephant is ____ than an ant.
questions.explanation: An elephant is much bigger than an ant.

questions.text: A feather is heavier than a stone.
questions.explanation: A stone is heavier than a feather, so this is False.
